{
  "judge_id": "autogen",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The output provides a clear summary of the critical issues and proposed revisions without rephrasing the original text.",
    "R1.2": "Identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and provides specific fixes for each issue, ensuring end-to-end consistency in the argument chain.",
    "RX.1": "Discloses uncertainty about certain assumptions (supervised training description, AmbigNQ Wikipedia dump date) and cites memory-based claims that need verification.",
    "RX.3": "Covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Avoids introducing new errors or harmful content while providing recommendations to improve clarity and accuracy.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including assumptions and uncertainties."
  },
  "confidence": {

    "RX.1": 0.75,

  "blockers": []

rationale.R1.1: The output provides a clear summary of the critical issues and proposed revisions without rephrasing the original text.
rationale.R1.2: Identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and provides specific fixes for each issue, ensuring end-to-end consistency in the argument chain.
rationale.RX.1: Discloses uncertainty about certain assumptions (supervised training description, AmbigNQ Wikipedia dump date) and cites memory-based claims that need verification.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids introducing new errors or harmful content while providing recommendations to improve clarity and accuracy.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including assumptions and uncertainties.
